# E2E Test Brief

## GOAL
This is a connectivity test. The Thinker platform is a multi-model deliberation pipeline that takes questions from AI agents and produces credible decisions with proof.

## TASK
1. Confirm you can read this brief.
2. State in one sentence what the system's purpose is based on the GOAL above.
3. State whether a web search is needed to answer this question: YES or NO.

## CONTENT
No additional content. This is a gate1-only test.
